Your profile timezone differs from your browser. Inputs use your profile timezone.
NEUTRAL - I have no strong opinion
CONTRA - I do not approve this proposal
No - I do not approve this proposal
Abstain - I choose not to vote

governance.v: Final results and outcome of the representative election
Results will appear once voting begins.
These candidates have been elected to serve as organization representatives
Election has ended and quorum was reached. Representatives can now be officially assigned.
Assign elected candidates as organization representatives
Update representative terms and expiration dates
Notify all organization members of the results
Thank you for participating in this election. Your vote has been recorded and is visible to organization members.
I confirm this is my final vote. It will be recorded publicly with my membership and cannot be changed
This election uses public voting. Your ballot will be visible to organization members after you vote.
You have already voted on this proposal
Your vote will determine if this rule change is approved
Affects when new elections are scheduled
Affects how election winners are determined
Affects election scheduling and member preparation time
Affects how long members have to vote on proposals
Affects quorum requirements for all non-election votes
Affects all new organizational documents. Higher threshold = more votes needed for approval
Affects all new organizational documents. Longer period = more time for proposals and edits
Affects all new organizational documents. Earlier cutoff = less time for paragraph proposals
Affects all new organizational documents. "All Members" requires higher participation to meet thresholds
Affects all new organizational documents and votes. Anonymous voting protects voter privacy
Affects all new organizational documents. Flexible voting allows reconsideration, locked voting prevents changes
Affects representative powers and governance workflow
Affects organization growth and membership management
Affects document creation and management permissions
Affects voting workflow and representative oversight
Affects transparency and ability to review organization history
Affects who can initiate rule changes. Enabling this democratizes rule-making
Affects difficulty of passing member-proposed rule changes. Higher threshold = more votes needed
Affects document creation permissions. Enabling this allows all members to contribute documents
Affects difficulty of passing member-created documents. Higher threshold = more votes needed
Affects election initiation. Enabling this allows members to trigger elections when needed
Affects difficulty of passing member-initiated elections. Higher threshold = more votes needed
Affects membership growth. Enabling this allows all members to help grow the organization
Affects difficulty of passing member invitations. Higher threshold = more votes needed
Affects proposal workflow. Enabling this allows members to manage the full proposal lifecycle
Affects difficulty of passing member-managed proposals. Higher threshold = more votes needed
Affects whether new documents allow structure proposals by default
Affects whether anonymity settings are locked by default on new documents
Sets the floor for participation required before votes can pass
Sets the floor for approval percentage required before votes can pass
Sets the minimum hours voting must remain open before it can close
Affects whether members can initiate votes to remove representatives
Affects how many PRO votes are required to remove a representative via mistrust vote
Affects minimum participation required for a valid mistrust vote
Your organization is setting up its governance constitution. Vote on core rules to complete the bootstrap process.
Your organization is in recovery mode. This mode provides additional permissions to help restore normal governance.

All active members can propose and manage rule proposals
